{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Bludgeon
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Bludgeon]] is a stone puppet-[[construct]] that stands like a brick wall.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
